name: 嗨喵乐园(HiPurrLand)
short_description: Hundreds of cats and fifteen brand-new levels await your exploration!
detailed_description:
HiPurrLand
Meow meow meow! Welcome to HiPurrLand! I’m one of the many adorable cats here, and I’m excited to tell you all about this delightful hidden object game!

Game Features
Hundreds of Hand-Drawn Cats
We’re all hand-drawn, each with unique poses and personalities just waiting for you to discover!

Fifteen Completely Different Levels
From bustling markets to mysterious forests and ancient castles, each level offers a brand-new experience. Can you find all the hidden cats?

Light Puzzles
It’s not just about finding cats—some levels have fun puzzles for you to solve. Use your brain and test your wits!

Stylized Black and White Graphics
The game features a unique black and white style, simple yet sophisticated, providing a special visual treat.

5 to 6 Hours of Fun
The entire game offers about 5 to 6 hours of joy, ensuring you’ll fall in love with this cat-finding adventure!

Developers' Story
A Duo of Animal Lovers


HiPurrLand is a labor of love created by two compassionate friends. The programming is handled by a talented young man, while the beautiful artwork is crafted by a creative young woman. Both of them adore animals, especially cats, and have poured their love for these furry friends into the game. They hope every player feels the warmth and joy that comes from their passion.

Why Play HiPurrLand?
Adorable: Because we cats are the cutest!
Fun: Each level has different challenges and surprises, keeping things interesting!
Relaxing: The black and white art style is both striking and soothing.
Dear humans, come and experience this purr-fect adventure! We can’t wait to play with you!

Meow~ Are you ready? Then come find us on Steam!

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Turkish, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean
*languages with full audio support
